title: Skipping a Date
excerpt: Currently, I have a need for a formula to skip sundays for a 6 day work week. Does anyone have anything they’ve used to accomplish this with a formula, or any suggestions? Currently using General Caster.

posts.author: DanCrum (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, I have a need for a formula to skip sundays for a 6 day work week. Does anyone have anything they’ve used to accomplish this with a formula, or any suggestions? Currently using General Caster.
